note: fix: explicit artifact-exists path instead of bare

before.desc: Configure tsc to emit JS + declarations to dist/

validate.command: node -e "const c = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('tsconfig.build.json','utf8')); if(c.compilerOptions.noEmit !== false) process.exit(1); if(c.compilerOptions.outDir !== 'dist') process.exit(1); if(!c.compilerOptions.declaration) process.exit(1)"

after.desc: Configure tsc to emit JS + declarations to dist/

validate.command: node -e "const c = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('tsconfig.build.json','utf8')); if(c.compilerOptions.noEmit !== false) process.exit(1); if(c.compilerOptions.outDir !== 'dist') process.exit(1); if(!c.compilerOptions.declaration) process.exit(1)"

before.desc: Update package.json exports to point at dist/ JS outputs, update bin to dist/roadmap.js

validate.command: node -e "const p = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!p.exports['.'].endsWith('.js')) process.exit(1); if(!p.bin.roadmap.includes('dist')) process.exit(1)"

after.desc: Update package.json exports to point at dist/ JS outputs, update bin to dist/roadmap.js

validate.command: node -e "const p = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!p.exports['.'].endsWith('.js')) process.exit(1); if(!p.bin.roadmap.includes('dist')) process.exit(1)"

note: add artifact-exists for .gitignore consume + shell test for artifact json

before.desc: Run build, verify dist/ outputs exist and CLI executes

after.desc: Run build, verify dist/ outputs exist and CLI executes
